details.productUrlName: Deflecting Palm JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to you this turn, prevent that damage. If damage is prevented this way, Deflecting Palm deals that much damage to that source's controller.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Any student of history has the power to learn from the past. The great ones use it to their advantage."
—Plargg, Lorehold dean
